'''Chiss Intelligence''' was the name of the intelligence gathering organization within the [[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|Chiss Ascendancy]].<ref name="Joiner King" /> During the [[Dark Nest Crisis]], the Chiss Intelligence dispatched<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|98|Reya (ReyaTaat)}}</ref> [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Intelligence officer/Legends|intelligence officer]] [[Daer'ey'ath]]<ref name="Swarm War">''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]''</ref> to gather information on the [[The Colony|Killik Colony]]. She was shot down over [[Jwlio]], one of the [[Moon/Legends|moons]] of [[Qoribu]],<ref name="CSWE" /> and by [[35 ABY/Legends|35 ABY]],<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> become a [[Joiner]] and a [[Prime (title)|Prime]] of the [[Taat]] nest.<ref name="Joiner King" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest I: The Joiner King]]'' {{1stm}}
